title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Construction Plant Cards Ltd
body: "Application number 5409  Applicant Construction Skills Certification Scheme Limited objected to the name used by Construction Plant Cards Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.   This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 5 November 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Construction Plant Cards Ltd is changed to 16293945, Ltd. "
